--- permalink: / title: "" excerpt: "" author_profile: true redirect_from: - /about/ - /about.html --- # About / 关于 Hi, I am **Chang Liu (刘畅)**. This is my personal homepage for collecting my projects, research interests, writing, experience, and ways to contact me. 你好，我是**刘畅**。这里是我的综合个人主页，用来展示我的项目、研究兴趣、文章记录、学习与工作经历，以及联系方式。 > This page is currently a first-version skeleton. Replace the placeholders below with your real profile, projects, publications, notes, and links. > > 当前页面是第一版骨架。后续可以把下面的占位内容替换为你的真实简介、项目、论文、文章和链接。 **Current focus / 当前关注方向** - Research / 研究方向：_to be updated_ - Engineering / 工程方向：_to be updated_ - Writing / 写作主题：_to be updated_ # Projects / 项目 Use this section to highlight selected work. Each project can include a short description, your role, technology stack, and useful links. 这个板块用于展示代表性项目。每个项目可以包含简介、你的职责、技术栈和相关链接。 ## Featured Projects / 代表项目 - **Project Name / 项目名称** One-sentence summary of what the project does and why it matters. 用一句话说明这个项目做了什么，以及它为什么重要。 _Role / 角色_: Developer / Researcher / Designer _Links / 链接_: [GitHub](https://github.com/ChangLiu-weiyu) / Demo / Paper - **Project Name / 项目名称** Add another project here. 在这里添加另一个项目。 _Tech stack / 技术栈_: Python, JavaScript, Jekyll, etc. # Writing / 写作 This section can collect blog posts, reading notes, research notes, or technical articles. 这个板块可以放博客文章、读书笔记、研究笔记或技术文章。 - _YYYY.MM_ — **Article title / 文章标题**. Short description. [Link](#) - _YYYY.MM_ — **Reading note / 阅读笔记**. Short description. [Link](#) # Experience / 经历 Use this section for education, work, internships, research experience, open-source contributions, awards, and activities. 这个板块可以放教育经历、工作/实习经历、科研经历、开源贡献、获奖和活动。 ## Education / 教育背景 - _YYYY.MM - YYYY.MM_ — **Degree / 学位**, University / 学校. Description / 简短说明。 ## Work & Research / 工作与科研 - _YYYY.MM - YYYY.MM_ — **Position / 职位**, Organization / 机构. Description / 简短说明。 ## Honors / 荣誉 - _YYYY.MM_ — Award name / 奖项名称。 # CV / 简历 You can add a downloadable CV here after preparing the file. 准备好简历文件后，可以在这里添加下载链接。 - [Download CV / 下载简历](files/cv.pdf) _(placeholder / 占位链接)_ # Contact / 联系 - Email / 邮箱：_to be updated_ - GitHub：[@ChangLiu-weiyu](https://github.com/ChangLiu-weiyu) - Google Scholar / 谷歌学术：_to be updated_ - LinkedIn：_to be updated_ If you find anything interesting here, feel free to reach out. 如果你对这里的内容感兴趣，欢迎联系我。

# Files

Put downloadable files here, such as:

- `cv.pdf` 鈥� your CV / resume
- transcripts, certificates, or other public documents if needed

# Chang Liu | 鍒樼晠 鈥� Personal Homepage

This repository hosts the source code for my personal homepage, built with Jekyll and deployed with GitHub Pages.

## Site Structure / 缃戠珯缁撴瀯

- `_config.yml` 鈥� site-wide settings and author profile / 鍏ㄧ珯閰嶇疆涓庝綔鑰呬俊鎭痋n- `_pages/about.md` 鈥� homepage content / 棣栭〉姝ｆ枃鍐呭�筡n- `_data/navigation.yml` 鈥� top navigation / 椤堕儴瀵艰埅
- `images/` 鈥� avatar, favicon, and project images / 澶村儚銆佺綉绔欏浘鏍囧拰椤圭洰鍥剧墖
- `files/` 鈥� downloadable files such as CV / 绠�鍘嗙瓑涓嬭浇鏂囦欢

## Local Preview / 鏈�鍦伴�勮�圽n
Install Ruby first, then run:

```powershell
bundle install
bundle exec jekyll liveserve
```

Open:

```text
http://127.0.0.1:4000
```

## Deployment / 閮ㄧ讲

For a user homepage repository named `ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io`, push this repository to GitHub and enable GitHub Pages from the `main` branch.

瀵逛簬鍚嶄负 `ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io` 鐨勭敤鎴蜂富椤典粨搴擄紝鎺ㄩ�佸埌 GitHub 鍚庯紝鍦ㄤ粨搴撹�剧疆涓�鍚�鐢ㄤ粠 `main` 鍒嗘敮閮ㄧ讲 GitHub Pages銆俓n
## Credits / 鑷磋阿

This site is customized from the AcadHomepage Jekyll template.
